concerns.text: Constitution Principle V claims T099 implements invalidation mechanism in 'utils/versioning.py' but project structure lists only utils/logging.py, utils/resources.py, utils/checksums.py — no versioning.py exists. Plan does not actually implement what it claims for Principle V compliance.

Contract file naming inconsistency: contracts/abs_summary.schema.yaml vs contracts/abs-summary.schema.yaml, and audit_record.schema.yaml vs audit-record.schema.yaml. Multiple similar-named contracts create ambiguity about which is canonical for plan elements.

Data model defines ABSummary with required fields 'domain' and 'publication_year', but contracts/ABSummary.schema.yaml does not include these as required fields. Entity definition mismatch between data model and contract.

Task ID inconsistency: Phase Overview references T044, T048, T083, T099, T096 but Implementation Tasks section only lists T026, T062, T076, T077, T081, T082. Task IDs not consistently defined across plan sections.

File path mismatch: data-model.md references 'data/processed/extracted_summaries.json' but plan.md project structure shows 'data/processed/' without specifying this file. Data flow diagram references files not in project structure.

Quickstart Step 7 references 'docs/novice_verification_log.csv' for novice verification logging, but plan.md project structure does not include this file path. Verification artifact not tracked in plan structure.
